name: Anastasia Gulenko
message: I have 5+ years of frontend development experience, including 3+ years building a complex SaaS product from scratch as one of two engineers, so I'm used to taking real ownership. I work with React and TypeScript daily, I care about performance and clean component architecture, and I'm comfortable working closely with product and design teams. I'm not someone who just builds what's in the ticket - I think about the product and the user too.
